title: diplazium australe
intro: Diplazium australe, also known as Austral fern or Austral lady fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Athyriaceae, native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Diplazium australe include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
